subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath adorned the brocaded pages of the Book of Days with the ornament of the Festival of Islam, and hath thereby adorned these temples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی طرز دیباج کتاب الایام بطراز عید الاسلام و به زین هیاکل
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @creation of the world, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness
